title: TBAR lodgment reminder for April 2026
description: If you've had transfer balance account events in the March quarter, you must lodge a TBAR by 28 April 2026.
keywords: TBAR, transfer, balance, account reporting, lodgment, reminder for April 2026, self, managed, super, funds, superannuation, SMSF

content_blocks.text: All self-managed super funds (SMSFs) must report transfer balance account (TBA) events on quarterly basis by lodging a transfer balance account report (TBAR). These events must be reported irrespective of the member's total superannuation balance.
TBARs for the March quarter are due on 28 April 2026 .
If no TBA event has occurred during the quarter, then no lodgment is required.
You may need to lodge a TBAR sooner where your member has exceed their personal transfer balance cap.
Refer to Event-based reporting for SMSFs and the TBAR instructions when preparing your TBAR.
The easiest way to lodge is through Online Services for Business .
Looking for the latest news for SMSFs? – You can stay up to date by visiting our SMSF newsroom and subscribing External Link to our monthly SMSF newsletter.

If no TBA event has occurred during the quarter, then no lodgment is required.
You may need to lodge a TBAR sooner where your member has exceed their personal transfer balance cap.

The easiest way to lodge is through Online Services for Business .
